name: Catppuccin Latte
aciklama: Catppuccin **Latte** (açık): Base `#eff1f5`, Text `#4c4f69`, Mauve `#8839ef`, Sapphire `#209fb5`, Yellow `#df8e1d`, Red `#d20f39`. Üst menü ve formlar açık yüzey; Meridian zinciri + `datepicker-catppuccin-latte.css`. Kaynak: github.com/catppuccin/catppuccin — `active_theme` / `ui_theme` => `catppuccin-latte`.
body_class: app-shell theme-meridian theme-catppuccin-latte cpp-shell d-flex flex-column min-vh-100
main_class: esh-app-main flex-grow-1 d-flex flex-column mr-main cpp-main
